256)":{"details":"Used by consumers that need to detect \"has any sucker ever peered to chain X?\" — e.g. to prevent premature burn of bridgeable credit by `JBReferralSplitHook.burnUnbridgeableCreditFor`. Returns every key from `_suckersOf[projectId]` regardless of active/deprecated state. Order matches the underlying `EnumerableMap` iteration order (insertion order, with swap-and-pop semantics on removal — which this registry doesn't trigger, since deprecation transitions to `_SUCKER_DEPRECATED` rather than deleting).","params":{"projectId":"The ID of the project to get the suckers of."},"returns":{"suckers":"The addresses of every sucker ever registered for `projectId`."}},"allowSuckerDeployer(address)":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (initially project ID 1, or JuiceboxDAO).","params":{"deployer":"The address of the deployer to add."}},"allowSuckerDeployers(address[])":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (initially project ID 1, or JuiceboxDAO).","params":{"deployers":"The addresses of the deployers to add."}},"allowTokenMapping(address,uint256,bytes32)":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (initially project ID 1, or JuiceboxDAO).","params":{"localToken":"The local token address.","remoteChainId":"The ID of the remote chain.","remoteToken":"The remote token address encoded as bytes32."}},"allowTokenMappings(address[],uint256[],bytes32[])":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (initially project ID 1, or JuiceboxDAO).","params":{"localTokens":"The local token addresses.","remoteChainIds":"The remote chain IDs.","remoteTokens":"The remote token addresses encoded as bytes32."}},"constructor":{"params":{"directory":"The juicebox directory.","initialOwner":"The initial owner of this contract.","permissions":"A contract storing permissions.","prices":"The prices contract for valuing remote per-context surplus/balance into a requested currency."}},"deploySuckersFor(uint256,bytes32,(address,bytes32,(address,uint32,bytes32)[])[])":{"params":{"configurations":"The sucker deployer configs to use to deploy the suckers.","projectId":"The ID of the project to deploy suckers for.","salt":"The deployment salt. For the suckers to be peers, this must be the same value on each chain where suckers are deployed."},"returns":{"suckers":"The addresses of the deployed suckers."}},"isSuckerOf(uint256,address)":{"params":{"addr":"The address of the sucker to check.","projectId":"The ID of the project to check for."},"returns":{"_0":"flag A flag indicating if the sucker belongs to the project, and was deployed through this registry."}},"isTrustedForwarder(address)":{"details":"Indicates whether any particular address is the trusted forwarder."},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"peerChainAccountsOf(uint256,uint256)":{"details":"A sucker building an outbound gossip bundle calls this to gather the project's full cross-chain knowledge (the registry is the only place a hub chain's per-peer suckers are visible together), then prepends its own local record. Records are deduped per chain (freshest wins; an active sucker's record supersedes a deprecated one's), and the destination chain and the local chain are excluded. Suckers and records that revert are silently skipped.","params":{"exceptChainId":"The destination chain to exclude (it has authoritative data about itself).","projectId":"The ID of the project."},"returns":{"accounts":"The deduped raw accounting records, one per known source chain."}},"remoteTotalSupplyOf(uint256)":{"details":"Each sucker holds an accounting record per source chain it has heard about (its direct peer plus chains gossiped through it), so this aggregates over every (sucker, chain) pair and dedups per chain. Includes deprecated suckers only when no active sucker answers for the same peer chain, to prevent undercounting during migration windows without letting stale deprecated records dominate live routes. Silently skips suckers and records that revert.","params":{"projectId":"The ID of the project."},"returns":{"totalSupply":"The combined peer chain total supply."}},"removeDeprecatedSucker(uint256,address)":{"details":"The sucker retains mint permission (`isSuckerOf` still returns true) so pending claims can still be fulfilled. It is excluded from `suckersOf` and `suckerPairsOf`.","params":{"projectId":"The ID of the project to remove the sucker from.","sucker":"The address of the deprecated sucker to remove."}},"removeSuckerDeployer(address)":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (initially project ID 1, or JuiceboxDAO).","params":{"deployer":"The address of the deployer to remove."}},"removeTokenMapping(address,uint256,bytes32)":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (initially project ID 1, or JuiceboxDAO).","params":{"localToken":"The local token address.","remoteChainId":"The ID of the remote chain.","remoteToken":"The remote token address encoded as bytes32."}},"removeTokenMappings(address[],uint256[],bytes32[])":{"details":"Can only be called by this contract's owner (initially project ID 1, or JuiceboxDAO).","params":{"localTokens":"The local token addresses.","remoteChainIds":"The remote chain IDs.","remoteTokens":"The remote token addresses encoded as bytes32."}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"requireTokenMappingAllowed(address,uint256,bytes32)":{"details":"Disable mappings never require owner approval. Non-native same-address mappings pass through directly. Native-to-native and differing-address mappings must be explicitly allowed.","params":{"localToken":"The local token address.","remoteChainId":"The ID of the remote chain.","remoteToken":"The remote token address encoded as bytes32."}},"setToRemoteFee(uint256)":{"details":"Only callable by the contract owner. Fee cannot exceed MAX_TO_REMOTE_FEE.","params":{"fee":"The new fee amount in wei."}},"suckerPairsOf(uint256)":{"params":{"projectId":"The ID of the project to get the suckers of."},"returns":{"pairs":"The pairs of suckers and their metadata."}},"suckersOf(uint256)":{"details":"Excludes suckers that have been deprecated and removed via `removeDeprecatedSucker`.","params":{"projectId":"The ID of the project to get the suckers of."},"returns":{"suckers":"The addresses of the suckers."}},"totalRemoteBalanceOf(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Aggregates over every (sucker, chain) pair and dedups per chain by freshest record, then sums each chain's balance valued into `currency`. Includes deprecated suckers only when no active sucker answers for the same peer chain, to prevent undercounting during migration windows without letting stale deprecated records dominate live routes. A context whose currency already matches is taken at par (no feed); a missing cross-currency feed reverts and that (sucker, chain) is silently skipped (conservative, bias-low).","params":{"currency":"The currency to value the combined balance into.","decimals":"The decimal precision for the returned value.","projectId":"The ID of the project."},"returns":{"balance":"The combined peer chain balance."}},"totalRemoteSurplusOf(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Aggregates over every (sucker, chain) pair and dedups per chain by freshest record, then sums each chain's surplus valued into `currency`. Includes deprecated suckers only when no active sucker answers for the same peer chain, to prevent undercounting during migration windows without letting stale deprecated records dominate live routes. A context whose currency already matches is taken at par (no feed); a missing cross-currency feed reverts and that (sucker, chain) is silently skipped (conservative, bias-low).","params":{"currency":"The currency to value the combined surplus into.","decimals":"The decimal precision for the returned value.","projectId":"The ID of the project."},"returns":{"surplus":"The combined peer chain surplus."}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"trustedForwarder()":{"details":"Returns the address of the trusted forwarder."}},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"DIRECTORY()":{"notice":"The Juicebox directory for project terminals and controllers."},"MAX_TO_REMOTE_FEE()":{"notice":"The maximum ETH fee (in wei) that the owner can set via `setToRemoteFee()`."},"PERMISSIONS()":{"notice":"A contract storing permissions."},"PRICES()":{"notice":"The prices contract for valuing remote per-context surplus and balance into a requested currency, exactly as the terminal store values local surplus."},"PROJECTS()":{"notice":"A contract which mints ERC-721s that represent project ownership and transfers."},"allSuckersOf(uint256)":{"notice":"All suckers for a project, INCLUDING deprecated entries that are no longer listed in `suckersOf`."},"allowSuckerDeployer(address)":{"notice":"Adds a suckers deployer to the allowlist."},"allowSuckerDeployers(address[])":{"notice":"Adds multiple sucker deployers to the allowlist."},"allowTokenMapping(address,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Adds a local-to-remote token mapping to the allowlist."},"allowTokenMappings(address[],uint256[],bytes32[])":{"notice":"Adds multiple local-to-remote token mappings to the allowlist."},"deploySuckersFor(uint256,bytes32,(address,bytes32,(address,uint32,bytes32)[])[])":{"notice":"Deploy one or more cross-chain suckers for a project in a single transaction. Each sucker is created via its deployer, registered in this registry, and immediately configured with its token mappings. Multiple suckers targeting the same peer chain are allowed for bridge resilience. The caller must have `DEPLOY_SUCKERS` permission, which also authorizes the initial token mappings in each deployment configuration."},"isSuckerOf(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Whether the given address is a sucker (active or deprecated) that was deployed through this registry for the specified project. Used by controllers to authorize mint calls from suckers."},"peerChainAccountsOf(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"The freshest accounting record per source chain that a project's suckers hold, for re-gossiping to a peer."},"remoteTotalSupplyOf(uint256)":{"notice":"The cumulative total supply across all remote peer chains for a project."},"removeDeprecatedSucker(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Lets anyone mark a deprecated sucker as removed from active listings."},"removeSuckerDeployer(address)":{"notice":"Removes a sucker deployer from the allowlist."},"removeTokenMapping(address,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Removes a local-to-remote token mapping from the allowlist."},"removeTokenMappings(address[],uint256[],bytes32[])":{"notice":"Removes multiple local-to-remote token mappings from the allowlist."},"requireTokenMappingAllowed(address,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Reverts unless a local-to-remote token mapping can be chosen by a project."},"setToRemoteFee(uint256)":{"notice":"Set the ETH fee (in wei) paid into the fee project on each toRemote() call."},"suckerDeployerIsAllowed(address)":{"notice":"Tracks whether the specified sucker deployer is approved by this registry."},"suckerPairsOf(uint256)":{"notice":"All active (non-deprecated) suckers for a project, with their remote peer address and chain ID."},"suckersOf(uint256)":{"notice":"Gets all of the specified project's active suckers which were deployed through this registry."},"toRemoteFee()":{"notice":"The ETH fee (in wei) paid into the fee project via terminal.pay() on each toRemote() call."},"tokenMappingIsAllowed(address,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Tracks whether projects may choose an owner-gated token mapping."},"totalRemoteBalanceOf(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"The cumulative peer-chain balance across all remote peer chains for a project, valued into a currency."},"totalRemoteSurplusOf(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"The cumulative peer-chain surplus across
